conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (@odata.nextLink absolute-URL pagination; the declarative next_url pagination type reads its cursor via connsdk.StringAt's dotted-path parser, which cannot address the literal dotted key "@odata.nextLink" -- see docs.md's Streams notes); hook-covered, proven live by archived parity evidence for outlook and internal/connectors/hooks/outlook/hooks_test.go.
